title: phegopteris lastreoides
intro: Phegopteris lastreoides, also known as the lastroide fern or creeping fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Phegopteris lastreoides is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an herbal tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
